generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how critical strategic autonomy is for our national security. The current administration's approach to defense partnerships is leaving us vulnerable. We can't afford to rely on unstable allies when our civil liberties and public safety are at stake. The data shows that countries with strong strategic autonomy have better preparedness and deterrence capabilities. It's time to prioritize our own security over empty promises from so-called allies. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
